name: 2 MG Tacrolimus Capsules IP
about: 2 MG Tacrolimus Capsules IP are a type of general medicine that is commonly prescribed by doctors for patients who have undergone an organ transplant. This medication helps to prevent the bodys immune system from rejecting the new organ. These capsules come in a physical form of small, easy-to-swallow capsules, with a dosage of 2mg per capsule. Each box contains 3x10 tablets, providing an ample supply for patients. This product is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trading. The medication should be taken as per the doctors suggestion and stored in a dry and cool place to ensure maximum effectiveness.
